title: Fix unshare gofmt issue
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Fix gofmt 1.11 issues in unshare.go which are causing build headaches.

comments.body: one of the 1.10 tests loops failed with a flake, going to retest.
bot's ignoring me, @rhatdan can you try please?
bot's on vacation, will try closing and reopening.

@nalind on 1.10 OCI tests I'm getting a bunch of:

```
not ok 147 inspect-config-is-json
# (in test file ./inspect.bats, line 27)
#   `cid=$(buildah from --pull --signature-policy ${TESTSDIR}/policy.json alpine)' failed with status 127
# /home/travis/gopath/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/./helpers.bash: line 44: /home/travis/gopath/src/github.com/containers/buildah/tests/./../buildah: No such file or directory
```
I thought it was a flake as all others are passing, but the same error on the second test run. Was I just twice unlucky?

:pushpin: Commit 3881a34 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 3881a34c2a1bfbf96a531d5c8b8524903740d9fe -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
